title: Pot Lid Handle Knob Grip Universal Pan Lid Top Replacement Holding Knob for Kitchen Cookware Casserole Glass Saucepan Kettle Cover
description:
About this item
● | WIDE COMPATIBILTY | - The pot lid top replacement knob is suitable for all lids which the mounting hole diameter between 5mm-7mm(0.2inch-0.27inch).
● | EASY INSTALLATION | - The process of installation is very easy, just put the knob, rubber gasket and metal gasket correctly, and then use screw to tight them, finish the installation in minutes.
● | HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL | - The pot lid handle knob is made of high-quality bakelite, heat resistant, dishwasher safe, insulating, sturdy and durable. The knob Heat-resistant can prevent your hand from injured.
● | HUMANIZED DESIGN | - The pot lid replacement knob adopts an isolated hollow design. you can firmly lift the lid by grasping the hole to avoid accidentally touching the lid and scalding.
● | WIDE APPLICATION | - The pot lid knob is suitable for many kinds of cookware pot lid covers, such as kettle, oil pot, frying pan, pot lids, saucepan lids, pan lids, casserole glass lid, just replace the lid knob then you can save your favorite and functional Lid.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Replacement for large old cast iron pot. Very sturdy, largeWorks as described, fits most glass lids and crock pot style lids.Good product. Ease to put onAfter years of use my original lid handle just crumbled to bits. This handle was an absolute perfect fit, with a grommet/washer that fit snuggly into the glass opening for the screw in hardware. While my old handle was white I have no issue with this black contrasting color given the amazing fit and quality!Fitz and works better than original.Fits my 13 inch glass ledTitle says it all. This is cheap, serviceable and perfect.This was an amazing save. I have a favorite pan that has a matching lid when. The screw stripped out on the lid and I was so bummed. So grateful to find this replacement and it worked out famously. Fast shipping was a bonus too! Definitely don’t hesitate if you need a new handle or lid for a pot pan.La parte es excelente, recupere la tapa de cristal de mi sartén que creí perdida. Lo recomiendo a todos definitivamente funciona al máximoAnd maybe even higher temps, but I can personally vouchsafe that it’s safe at 450.
reviews_1s: I bought a skillet from this company and discovered their defective lid handles. The one that came with it and this one (the one I bought to replace it) gets water under the handle. It ruins the cooking experience. These handles or knobs are no good.The handle did not come with hardware pictured . My original screw will not fit the new handle. Pretty useless without hardware.Screw isn't long enough. Also finish is flaking when removing from package.Screw not right for small pot lid.No Knob with Lid Purchase. Ordered Knob which is Missing Gaskets & Screw
